subject: [For Review] Dec CB Monthly Management Meeting

content.answer:
Hi Ian & Jianghong,

Please find the attached V1 deck for the upcoming CB Management Meeting on
Tuesday 16th Dec, for your review.

Preparation Timeline:

   - Deck Draft 1: 12 Dec (Fri)
   - Deck Draft 2: 15 Dec 4PM (Mon)
   - Final Draft to Terence: 15 Dec 7PM (Mon)

The 4 topics below are still WIP and will be added in draft 2 on 15 Dec.

   - CB Take Rate Increase
   - CNLS Performance Update
   - SIP Performance Update
   - SLS Non-BSA Tender Update

Let me know if you have any questions.


Max Goh

Address: 1 Fusionopolis Place, #09-10, Galaxis, Singapore 138522

Hi Ian, Jianghong,

Please see updated slides for meeting with TP tomorrow.

All content is ready except for SIP section: Slide 87 and Slide 94. This
will be aligned separately with Ian before adding to final version.

The main agenda will be a recap of CB take rate increase plan and next
steps, as well as 2026 plan of various BUs.

Let me know if any questions.


On Fri, Dec 12, 2025 at 10:19 PM Max Goh Shi Long <max.gohsl@shopee.com>
wrote:



-- 
*Jason YU*
*Regional CB | MY & SG CB*
*Mobile*: +65 90284825
*Email*: jason.yu@shopee.com

Hi Ian, Jianghong,

Please see final version of slides attached, SIP slides have been included.

Let me know for any questions.

content.question:
Thanks.



Slide 8

   - We probably need to adjust the number downwards taking into account
   ads growth plan to be launched in Feb instead?

Slide 10

   - Similarly, this should take effect in Feb instead of Jan?

Why do we
   not want to roll out in PH?

- We should also bring up legal concerns which we are trying to iron out
   with legal at the moment?

Slide 12

   - For FBS, I thought we wanted to close the gap with SLS commissions?
Seems like we are not fully closing the gap?

content.answer:
Hi Ian,

Please see new deck attached and response below.

Slide 8

   -

   We probably need to adjust the number downwards taking into account ads
   growth plan to be launched in Feb instead?
   -

   Adjusted



Slide 10

   -

   Similarly, this should take effect in Feb instead of Jan? Why do we not
   want to roll out in PH?
   -

   Adjusted, and PH wants to roll out same mechs as local (only for 15D
   Auto TopUp active sellers set 2% threshold, which is much softer than other
   markets, local CB PIC still aligning with local country)
   -

   We should also bring up legal concerns which we are trying to iron out
   with legal at the moment?
   -

   Added - legal is concerned with charging as “service fee” to all sellers
   with no explicit opt-out route



Slide 12

   -

   For FBS, I thought we wanted to close the gap with SLS commissions?
   Seems like we are not fully closing the gap?
   -

   We had discussed this with local teams. For SG, MY and PH, they propose
   to keep to the original plan of closing some but not all gap, and
   observe impact to FBS orders. The rationale is that we rely on CB FBS to
   drive up overall FBS penetration and there remain CB sellers not yet
   acquired while platform FBS PRM has yet to fully kick in. Since the
   commission differentiation worked well in 2025, propose to continue to
   aggressively acquire remaining sellers and match FBS to SLS rates in Q2.
